template.topStrip: dark charcoal strip, full width across text zone, compact white uppercase context text
template.mainBlock: bright yellow rectangular hook block with ultra-bold black condensed uppercase text
template.ctaBlock: red urgency strip directly below main block with short white uppercase CTA text
template.supportBadge: single circular badge near lower boundary between text zone and character/support-visual zone

variantSystem.A: Exact Channel Match: hard text stack, standard channel composition, one support visual, closest to proven thumbnails.
variantSystem.B: Hook Push: bigger main hook, tighter top strip, stronger CTA block, more visible support badge, more aggressive contrast.
